zh.Thornton le Moors, Cheshire, England: 英國爾桑頓 勒 波斯
zh.Thornton, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾桑頓 馬福
zh.lifeSummary: 當Avice de Kingsely於1200年出生在英國英格蘭爾金斯利時，她的父親Richard de Cheshire Kingsley35歲，母親Lady Joan de Stourton10歲。她於1222年之前與Lord Randal Thornton在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1244年在英國爾桑頓 馬福享年44歲。

zh-hans.Thornton le Moors, Cheshire, England: 英国爾桑頓 勒 波斯
zh-hans.Thornton, Cheshire, England: 英国英格兰爾桑頓 馬福
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Avice de Kingsely于1200年出生在英国英格兰爾金斯利时，她的父亲Richard de Cheshire Kingsley35岁，母亲Lady Joan de Stourton10岁。她于1222年之前与Lord Randal Thornton在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1244年在英国爾桑頓 馬福享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Kingsely
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places called Kingsley, in Cheshire, Hampshire, and Staffordshire. The placenames derive from Old English cing ‘king’ (genitive cinges) + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

nameMeanings.name: Avice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French form of the ancient Germanic name Aveza, derived from a short form of one or more compound names containing the first element av (as in Ava ; the meaning is uncertain). The correspondence in form to the Latin word avis ‘bird’ is coincidental.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Avice de Kingsely was born in 1200, in Kingsley, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Richard de Cheshire Kingsley, was 35 and her mother, Lady Joan de Stourton, was 10. She married Lord Randal Thornton before 1222, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1244, in Thornton Mayow, Cheshire, England, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Avice de Kingsely est née en 1200, à Kingsley, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard de Cheshire Kingsley, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Lady Joan de Stourton, avait 10 ans. Elle a épousé Lord Randal Thornton avant 1222, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1244, à Thornton Mayow, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.Thornton, Cheshire, England: Thornton Mayow, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Avice de Kingsely 1200 in Kingsley, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard de Cheshire Kingsley 35 und ihre Mutter Lady Joan de Stourton 10. Sie hat vor 1222 in England Lord Randal Thornton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1244 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Thornton Mayow, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Avice de Kingsely è nata il nel 1200 nel Kingsley, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Richard de Cheshire Kingsley, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Lady Joan de Stourton, aveva 10 anni. Lei sposato Lord Randal Thornton prima del 1222, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1244, nel Thornton Mayow, Cheshire, England, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Avice de Kingselyが1200年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアキングスリーで生まれた時，父Richard de Cheshire Kingsleyは35歳，母Lady Joan de Stourtonは10歳であった。1222年以前にイギリスでLord Randal Thorntonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1244年にイギリスチェシュアイアソルントン メイオウで44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Avice de Kingsely(이)가 1200년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 킨그슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard de Cheshire Kingsley(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Joan de Stourton(은)는 10세였다. 그녀는 1222년 이전 영국에서 Lord Randal Thornton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1244년 영국 체실르 토른턴 메이요에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.Thornton, Cheshire, England: Thornton Mayow, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Avice de Kingsely nasceu em 1200, em Kingsley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard de Cheshire Kingsley, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Lady Joan de Stourton, tinha 10 anos. Ela casou-se com Lord Randal Thornton antes 1222, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1244, em Thornton Mayow, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 44 anos.

ro.Thornton, Cheshire, England: Thornton Mayow, Cheshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Avice de Kingsely родилась в 1200 г. в местности кингсли, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Richard de Cheshire Kingsley было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Joan de Stourton, 10. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lord Randal Thornton перед 1222 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1244 г. в местности таурнтон меиоу, чешир, Англия в возрасте 44 лет.

Se casó con Lord Randal Thornton antes de 1222, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1244, en Thornton Mayow, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 44 años.
